The '''Suuv Ban D'Krid''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warship.

==Characteristics==
A Suuv Ban D'Krid boasted similar firepower to the smaller [[Uumufalh]] gunship but also carried 36 [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]]. It had broad red and green arms which served as docking bays for the coralskippers.

Each Suuv Ban D'Krid was 740 meters in length and had 40 [[Yaret-Kor]].

==History==
Several of these took part in the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|invasion]] of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
